diffs.diff:
--- a/check.py
+++ b/check.py
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+import torch

+import os

+for n in sorted(os.listdir('checkpoints')):

+    p = os.path.join('checkpoints', n)

+    c = torch.load(p, map_location='cpu', weights_only=False)

+    print(n, c.get('val_bal'), c.get('arch'), c.get('epoch'), c.get('seed'))
